特記事項: 【合併】英語IIｂ　１９（経済学部）/英語IIIｂ　１９（経済学部）
授業方法: Various methods including, pair and group work, listening exercises, dialog construction and presentation.Each class will consist of various speaking and listening skills, pair work and group activities.  Creating and writing theme-based dialogs and presenting them will also be included.

第1回:
【Startup Week】     【Flex Hours】    "Online class（On-demand format）"   《30 minutes》　　Orientation, rules and regulations, course format, short self-introductions    Assignment:  Write a 200 plus word self-introduction essay and bring to class next week.


https://kwansei.jp.panopto.com/Panopto/Pages/Viewer.aspx?id=ad18e90e-7703-46d6-9191-b3ee008528a8
Essay:  My family    45 minutes of study
第2回: 【Core Weeks 1】     "Face-to-face class"     《90 minutes》     group interview chart,  collecting relevant data
Review of class introduction. 45 minutes of out of class study.
第3回: 【Core Weeks 2】    "Face-to-face class"    《90 minutes》   Text: Overview unit, world map, what is famous in ...? common "wh" questions
World map detail points. One hour of study.
第4回: 【Core Weeks 3】    "Face-to-face class"    　《90 minutes》　　　Text: Italy, pair work gap information exercise, listening comprehension activity, comparative adjectives
Grammar skills worksheet homework assignment. One hour or more of study.
第5回: 【Core Weeks 4】     "Face-to-face class"   《90 minutes》     Text: New Zealand, cultural and historical questions, vocabulary matching exercise, writing-paragraph construction
New Zealand news article and questions. One hour or more of out of class study.
第6回: 【Core Weeks 5】     "Face-to-face class"    　《90 minutes》     Text: China, talking about news, pair work dialog construction and presentation
Review of in-class study. Revision of dialogs. One hour or more of study.
第7回: 【Flex Hours】  "Online class（On-demand format）"     《90 minutes》　　See LUNA for uploaded lesson material
第8回: 【Core Weeks 6】   "Face-to-face class"   　《90 minutes》　　　 Text: USA, San Francisco area map-giving and confirming directions, pair work gap information activity
Informative detailed directions worksheet assignment. One hour of out of class study.
第9回: 【Core Weeks 7】     "Face-to-face class"        《90 minutes》    　　　Text: Switzerland, listening comprehension activity, small group interview chart
Essay: Switzerland's history of neutrality. One hour or more of study.
第10回: 【Core Weeks 8】    "Face-to-face class"     　《90 minutes》　　  Text: Tanzania, choose the correct answer, adverbs of frequency, dialog construction and presentation
Presentation first draft for revision. One hour or more of out of class study.
第11回: 【Core Weeks 9】    "Face-to-face class"     　《90 minutes》　　　　　Text: Australia, pair work interview exchange, listening comprehension activity, writing presentations
Rewriting the presentation. One hour or more of study.
第13回: 【Core Weeks 10】          "Face-to-face class"    　《90 minutes》　　　　Text: Canada, making comparisons, pair work information gap activity, presentations
Critique of presentations worksheet. One hour of study.
第14回: 【Flex Hours】  "Online class（On-demand format）"     《90 minutes》　　See LUNA for uploaded lesson material
Essay: Key points to a good presentation. One hour of out of class study.
第15回: 【Core Weeks 11】    "Face-to-face class"   《90 minutes》　　　　　Text: France, overseas travel advice activity, group presentations continued, listening comprehension activity,  exam explanation and practice
Cultural communicative gaps worksheet assignment. One hour of study.
第16回: 【Core Weeks 12】           "Face-to-face class"    　《90 minutes》　　　【Classes and examinations period】
トピック.授業外学習2: Students would be advised to do as much personal study outside the classroom as possible.  Also, to submit any homework assignments on time.

学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。
DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。
各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。
